description.en: ClinicalTrials.gov-based candidate site filtering and explainable scoring for rapid CTM decisions.
description.zh: 基于 ClinicalTrials.gov 的候选站点筛选与可解释评分，支持 CTM 快速决策。
description.de: Kandidaten-Sites auf Basis von ClinicalTrials.gov filtern und mit erklaerbaren Scores priorisieren.

designIntent.en: Turn sparse public trial history into an auditable site ranking surface.
designIntent.zh: 把公开试验历史转换为可审计、可解释的站点评分面板。
designIntent.de: Oeffentliche Trial-Historie in eine nachvollziehbare Site-Rangliste ueberfuehren.

name.zh: 站点可行性（人类反馈版）

description.en: Human-in-the-loop ranking that learns from CTM preference feedback and updates weights transparently.
description.zh: 引入 CTM 反馈回路，动态学习偏好并透明更新权重的站点排序系统。
description.de: Human-in-the-loop Ranking mit nachvollziehbarer Gewichtsanpassung aus Nutzerfeedback.

designIntent.en: Encode tacit operator judgment into stable, explainable recommendation behavior.
designIntent.zh: 把隐性经验编码进推荐策略，同时保持可解释与可审计。
designIntent.de: Implizites Expertenwissen in erklaerbares Ranking-Verhalten ueberfuehren.

description.en: Transforms site/investigator Likert survey datasets into actionable engagement insight dashboards.
description.zh: 将 site/investigator 的 Likert 调研数据转化为可执行的参与度洞察面板。
description.de: Likert-Surveydaten von Sites/Investigators in handlungsfaehige Insight-Dashboards ueberfuehren.

designIntent.en: Move from survey score tables to intervention-ready insight narratives.
designIntent.zh: 从调研分数表迈向“可直接行动”的洞察叙事。
designIntent.de: Von statischen Survey-Tabellen zu interventionstauglichen Narrativen gelangen.

description.en: Protocol querying, eligibility checks, and medication restriction decisions with clause-level evidence.
description.zh: 面向 protocol 的问答检索、入排判断与用药限制校验，并提供条款级证据。
description.de: Protocol-Abfrage, Eligibility-Pruefung und Medikations-Checks mit klauselgenauer Evidenz.

designIntent.en: Replace ambiguous interpretation loops with traceable protocol decisions.
designIntent.zh: 减少 protocol 解释歧义，输出可追溯的决策链路。

description.en: Synthetic control and sample-size reduction simulation with power/bias risk assessment.
description.zh: 围绕 synthetic control 与样本量缩减进行仿真，并评估 power 与偏差风险。
description.de: Simulation von Synthetic Control und Sample-Size-Reduktion mit Power-/Bias-Risikoanalyse.

designIntent.en: Stress-test control-arm reduction hypotheses before protocol commitment.
designIntent.zh: 在方案确定前先压力测试“对照组缩减”假设。
designIntent.de: Hypothesen zur Kontrollarm-Reduktion vor Protokollfestlegung robust pruefen.

description.en: Structured cohort search over EHR/claims to estimate recruitable patients and enrollment velocity.
description.zh: 将入排标准结构化并检索 EHR/claims，预测可招募患者与入组速度。
description.de: Strukturierte Cohort-Suche ueber EHR/Claims zur Schaetzung von Rekrutierbarkeit und Enrollment-Tempo.

designIntent.en: Bridge protocol criteria and real-world patient availability with operationally useful projections.
designIntent.zh: 连接 protocol 条件与真实患者供给，输出可执行的招募预测。
designIntent.de: Protocol-Kriterien mit realer Patientenverfuegbarkeit in operative Prognosen ueberfuehren.

description.en: Stochastic site-level enrollment forecasting with probability-to-target and milestone risk alerts.
description.zh: 基于站点级随机建模的入组预测，输出达标概率与里程碑风险预警。
description.de: Stochastische Site-basierte Enrollment-Prognose mit Zielwahrscheinlichkeit und Milestone-Risiko.

designIntent.en: Quantify enrollment uncertainty early enough to trigger tactical intervention.
designIntent.zh: 尽早量化入组不确定性，以便提前触发干预动作。
designIntent.de: Enrollment-Unsicherheit frueh quantifizieren, um taktische Eingriffe rechtzeitig auszulösen.

description.en: Signal radar for clinical development programs, vendor moves, and big-tech watch.
description.zh: 聚合临床项目、vendor 变动与科技巨头动态的信号雷达。
description.de: Signalradar fuer klinische Programme, Vendor-Bewegungen und Big-Tech Monitoring.

designIntent.en: Rebuild a legacy intelligence homepage into a modular AI-native editorial console.
designIntent.zh: 将旧版情报首页重构为模块化的 AI-native 编辑型控制台。
designIntent.de: Legacy-Intelligence-Homepage als modulares AI-natives Editorial-Console neu aufbauen.

description.en: Visual orchestration for protocol-to-execution study workflows.
description.zh: 将方案到执行阶段串联为可视化临床流程。
description.de: Visuelle Orchestrierung klinischer Abläufe von Protokoll bis Execution.

designIntent.en: Translate protocol complexity into navigable operational states.
designIntent.zh: 把复杂方案翻译成可导航的运营状态。

description.en: Transforms fragmented notes into coherent editorial signal maps.
description.zh: 把碎片化笔记组织成可读的信号地图。
description.de: Fragmentierte Notizen in konsistente Signal-Maps umformen.

designIntent.en: Keep writing raw, then recover structure later with semantic indexing.
designIntent.zh: 先保持原始书写，再用语义索引回收结构。
designIntent.de: Roh schreiben, Struktur später semantisch rekonstruieren.

description.en: Early risk sensing layer for oncology program timelines.
description.zh: 用于肿瘤项目时间线的早期风险感知层。

designIntent.en: Expose uncertainty ranges before delays become visible in reports.
designIntent.zh: 在报告显现延迟之前先暴露不确定区间。
designIntent.de: Unsicherheitskorridore sichtbar machen, bevor Verzögerungen reportet werden.

description.en: Prompt traces, evaluation logs, and reusable operator patterns.
description.zh: 用于提示轨迹、评估日志与操作模式复用。

designIntent.en: Treat prompts as evolving operational assets, not static text.
designIntent.zh: 把提示词视为持续演化的运营资产，而非静态文本。
designIntent.de: Prompts als operative Assets statt statischer Texte behandeln.

description.en: Session-level rhythm tracking for serve and footwork consistency.
description.zh: 记录发球与步伐在单次训练中的节奏一致性。
description.de: Rhythmus-Tracking pro Session für Aufschlag und Fußarbeit.

designIntent.en: Bridge subjective feel and measurable cadence across drills.
designIntent.zh: 连接主观手感与可度量训练节奏。
designIntent.de: Subjektives Gefühl mit messbarer Kadenz in Drills verbinden.

description.en: Cut-density and transition pacing analyzer for short-form videos.
description.zh: 短视频剪辑的切点密度与转场节奏分析器。
description.de: Analyse von Schnittdichte und Übergangs-Timing für Kurzformate.

designIntent.en: Support narrative pace decisions with measurable cut patterns.
designIntent.zh: 用可度量的切点模式支撑叙事节奏决策。
designIntent.de: Narratives Timing über messbare Schnittmuster unterstützen.

description.en: Cross-book concept clustering with concise synthesis snapshots.
description.zh: 跨书概念聚类与短摘要快照。
description.de: Konzept-Clustering über Bücher mit kompakten Synthese-Snapshots.

designIntent.en: Compress a year of reading into reusable conceptual vectors.
designIntent.zh: 把全年阅读压缩为可复用的概念向量。
designIntent.de: Ein Lesejahr in wiederverwendbare Konzeptvektoren komprimieren.

description.en: Catalog of architectural motifs linked to spatial emotion notes.
description.zh: 建筑形态采样库，关联空间情绪注记。
description.de: Katalog architektonischer Motive mit räumlichen Emotionsnotizen.

designIntent.en: Capture form-language patterns that influence interface composition.
designIntent.zh: 捕捉影响界面构图的形态语言模式。
